scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 17 (Surat al-Shu'ara').

terms.english: to bar its counting; to withhold it from the count
terms.note: A compact poetic verb glossed by the commentator himself as منع عده, i.e. not treating the phrase as a separate verse ending in that counting tradition.

terms.english: the poem indicates; the versified text shows
terms.note: Used when the commentator infers the number or identity of disputed places from what the matn includes, even when one item is then added separately in prose.
